# Verification matrix

<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen_validation_artifacts` from src/verification.rs; pinned by tests/verification_artifacts_doc_sync.rs. Do not edit by hand. -->

The complete, machine-checked evidence ledger: **87 rows — 37 VALIDATED, 46 MODELLED, 4 PARTNER**. A row may be VALIDATED only with an independent external oracle (the matrix invariant tests enforce this). The same data, with clickable per-row links to each test, module and committed fixture, is the *Validation ledger* on https://kshana.dev. See [MODELLED-RATIONALE.md](MODELLED-RATIONALE.md) for why each Modelled row is not externally validated.
